summary: Spec review accepts the Stage 5 Lode read capability asset batch as bounded package/catalog/lifecycle truth for issues #149, #150, #151, #154, and #155.
reviewed_validation_summary: python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json; jq registry query/candidate checks; git diff --check; loom suite validate/evidence/carrier; loom fact-chain; loom verify passed locally before PR. Loom verify reports Codex plugin runtime cache stale while CLI/source payload is 0.28.0; treated as host runtime cache surface, not repo code.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Lode as package/catalog/lifecycle/schema/fixture truth owner and excludes marketplace, runtime execution, private browser material, Core run truth, App package truth, Harbor evidence truth, and Stage 6 writes.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The planned implementation is limited to repo-local package metadata, registry fixtures, validator checks, and item-specific Loom carrier for LODE-149.
